handoff.reason: Phased implementation must preserve scanner compatibility while consolidating semantic truth into canonical ElementData.

execution_rules.phase_gate: Complete each phase, run its validation, then update communication.json before advancing.
execution_rules.hard_stop_policy: Hard stops are recorded at every phase boundary for explicit review of compatibility and contract changes.

hard_constraints: No production populate path may use a second semantic scanner.
Headers are optional and off by default.
Path outputs and CodeRef IDs use relative POSIX-style paths.
usedBy must be true reverse dependency.

communication_log.summary: Created phased workorder to unify CodeRef semantic systems under the canonical scanner pipeline.
Started compatibility audit and canonical semantic model implementation.
Recorded canonical truth, field contracts, consumers, and constraints in analysis.json.

Implemented canonical CodeRef IDs, relative POSIX paths, reverse usedBy, semantic-registry projection, opt-in source headers, populate CLI updates, RAG CodeRef preference, and compatibility build fixes.
